statement: INSERT INTO evaluator (user_id, name, judge_prompt, prompt_parser, response_parser, class_config, judge_models, client_side) VALUES (%(user_id)s, %(name)s, %(judge_prompt)s, %(prompt_parser)s, %(response_parser)s, %(class_config)s, %(judge_models)s, %(client_side)s) RETURNING evaluator.id

parameters.name: test_eval
parameters.judge_prompt:
{"messages":[{"content":"[System]
Please act as an impartial judge and evaluate the quality of the response provided by an assistant to the user question displayed below.
Your job is to evaluate how good the assistant's answer is.
Your evaluation should consider correctness and helpfulness. Identify any mistakes.

Be as objective as possible.","role":"system"},{"content":"
[start of user question]
{user_message}
[end of user quesstion]

[start of assistant answer]
{assistant_message}
[end of assistant answer]","role":"user"}],"frequency_penalty":null,"logit_bias":null,"logprobs":null,"top_logprobs":null,"max_completion_tokens":null,"n":null,"presence_penalty":null,"response_format":null,"seed":null,"stop":null,"temperature":null,"top_p":null,"tools":null,"tool_choice":null,"parallel_tool_calls":null,"extra_headers":null,"extra_query":null,"extra_body":null}

parameters.response:
{"model": "llama-3-8b-chat@aws-bedrock", "created": 1727442665, "id": "chatcmpl-9f996118-82c6-4bab-b939-ef6c5606012e", "object": "chat.completion", "usage": {"completion_tokens": 186, "prompt_tokens": 24, "total_tokens": 210, "completion_tokens_details": null, "cost": 0.00011879999999999999}, "choices": [{"finish_reason": "stop", "index": 0, "message": {"content": "

The largest planet in our solar system is Jupiter. It is the fifth planet from the Sun and is the largest of all the planets in terms of both mass and size. It has a diameter of approximately 142,984 kilometers (88,846 miles), which is more than 11 times the diameter of the Earth.

Jupiter is a gas giant, meaning that it is primarily composed of hydrogen and helium gases. It has a massive atmosphere, with storm systems that can be thousands of kilometers wide. The planet's most distinctive feature is the Great Red Spot, a persistent anticyclonic storm that has been raging for centuries.

Jupiter is also known for its many moons, with 79 known to exist. The four largest moons, Io, Europa, Ganymede, and Callisto, are known as the Galilean moons, as they were discovered by Galileo Galilei in 1610.", "role": "assistant", "tool_calls": null, "function_call": null}}]}

It was a period of violence and terror in which thousands of people were executed for perceived counter-revolutionary activities, and it was characterized by the rule of Maximilien Robespierre and the Committee of Public Safety.", "role": "assistant", "tool_calls": null, "function_call": null}}]}

statement: INSERT INTO stored_prompt_response (prompt_id, prompt_variation_id, endpoint_str, response, num_tokens) SELECT p0::INTEGER, p1::INTEGER, p2::VARCHAR, p3::VARCHAR, p4::INTEGER FROM (VALUES (%(prompt_id__0)s, %(prompt_variation_id__0)s, %(endpoint_str__0)s, %(response__0)s, %(num_tokens__0)s, 0), (%(prompt_id__1)s, %(prompt_variation_id__1)s, %(endpoint_str__1)s, %(response__1)s, %(num_tokens__1)s, 1)) AS imp_sen(p0, p1, p2, p3, p4, sen_counter) ORDER BY sen_counter RETURNING stored_prompt_response.id, stored_prompt_response.id AS id__1

parameters.response__0: {"model": "llama-3-8b-chat@aws-bedrock", "created": 1727442666, "id": "chatcmpl-93bb23f9-cb7e-49c2-bf5e-a208cc753e0e", "object": "chat.completion", "usage": {"completion_tokens": 108, "prompt_tokens": 30, "total_tokens": 138, "completion_tokens_details": null, "cost": 7.38e-05}, "choices": [{"finish_reason": "stop", "index": 0, "message": {"content": "\n\nThe half-life of carbon-14 (14C) is approximately 5,730 years. This is the time it takes for half of the original amount of 14C in a sample to decay into nitrogen-14 (14N) through beta decay. Radiocarbon dating is a technique used to determine the age of organic materials by measuring the amount of 14C remaining in the sample, and it is commonly used in archaeology and geology to date artifacts and events up to around 50,000 years old.", "role": "assistant", "tool_calls": null, "function_call": null}}]}
parameters.response__1: {"model": "llama-3-8b-chat@aws-bedrock", "created": 1727442666, "id": "chatcmpl-e0f7edf1-8b01-4629-914d-877a897b4273", "object": "chat.completion", "usage": {"completion_tokens": 80, "prompt_tokens": 28, "total_tokens": 108, "completion_tokens_details": null, "cost": 5.64e-05}, "choices": [{"finish_reason": "stop", "index": 0, "message": {"content": "\n\nThe closest known exoplanet to Earth is Proxima b, which orbits Proxima Centauri, the nearest star to the Sun, located about 4.24 light-years away. Proxima b is a terrestrial planet with a mass at least 1.3 times that of Earth and orbits its star within the habitable zone, where liquid water could potentially exist on its surface.", "role": "assistant", "tool_calls": null, "function_call": null}}]}
